items.nearby_content:
Abstract
Dynamic  performance  of  machine  foundations  under  various excitation load is one of the important problems in  engineering.  Machine  foundations  dynamic  response  affected by several parameters including machine and soil  properties, loading magnitudes and geometries, foundation  geometry,  shape,  and  embedded  depth.  A  systematic  methodology  was  adopted  to  collect  and  analyze  significant  studies.  Through  an  extensive  review  of  the  literature, the discussed papers illustrate the contributions  and effects of soil properties, improvement, techniques,  foundation  types,  and  load  conditions  on  performance.  Several studies have confirmed that the foundation shape  and  embedment  depth  are  among  parameters  which  extensively  affect  its  dynamic  behavior.  Investigation  regarding  the  effect  of  both  dynamic  loading  and  soil  conditions  is  needed.  While  numerical  Modeling  simulations are considered as an effective tool for studying  and determining foundation dynamic response, they should  be supported by experimental studies to obtain a clear  understanding. These outcomes offer useful inputs for the  machine foundation d

© 202@ Penerbit UTM Press. All rights reserved
1.0 INTRODUCTION
Machine are considered a key part in factories, power
plants and others industry activities. The machine should  be supported by adequate foundation to withstand  the  vibration forces and transform them to the soil without any  risk. Experimental and theoretical techniques can be used  to make a great deal of contribution to this knowledge.  Therefore, general computational numerical modeling has
mostly  been  used  in  simulation  the  responses  of  foundations to dynamic loads. In using the finite element  method, the material properties and geometries can be  simulated  accurately,  it  is  suitable  for  analyzing  the  machine foundation behavior  under exposure of  loads.  The numerical simulation methods provide worthy valued  information on the behavior of soil, and the response of  the foundation under the dynamic loads.
